problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Combining Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
